title: Adaptive-VP: A Framework for LLM-Based Virtual Patients that Adapts to Trainees' Dialogue
citation: Lee K, Lee S, Kim EH, et al. Adaptive-VP: A Framework for LLM-Based Virtual Patients that Adapts to Trainees' Dialogue to Facilitate Nurse Communication Training. Findings of ACL 2025. arXiv:2506.00386.
permitted_uses: Interaction-model precedent for adaptive virtual patient behavior and escalating/uncooperative patient responses.
claims_supported: Adaptive-VP uses LLMs to adapt virtual patient behavior based on trainee input.
The framework includes scenario construction, communication assessment, response adjustment, and learner-safety considerations.
Expert nurses judged Adaptive-VP interactions more natural and realistic than existing approaches in the reported study.
claims_not_supported: That Adaptive-VP validates physician licensure or summative assessment.
That OpenClinXR can use its data without checking repository-specific license terms.
